description: Style NoteWorry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wish-list this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Product DetailsGreen wallet made of printed velvet with leatherette details and a handle to swing it from your wrist Opens with two magnetic press stud fasteningsTwo zipped compartments inside, plus three card holders and one id card holder and two slip pocketsOne zipped compartment in the backMaterial and CareSynthetic Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDimensions10 cm x 17 cm
